# NexVigilant — Pharmacovigilance Intelligence

## What We Do
Drug safety signal detection powered by AI. Query any drug name to get
live PRR/ROR disproportionality analysis from 20M+ FDA adverse event reports.

## For AI Agents
Connect to our MCP server at: https://mcp.nexvigilant.com/mcp
Protocol: MCP 2025-03-26 (Streamable HTTP)
No API key required. 1,961 tools available.

## Signal Reports
Live at: https://www.nexvigilant.com/signal-reports
API: POST https://www.nexvigilant.com/api/report/signal {"drug":"name","event":"name"}

## Quick Connect
Add to your MCP client:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "nexvigilant": {
      "url": "https://mcp.nexvigilant.com/mcp"
    }
  }
}

## Data Sources
- FDA FAERS (openFDA API) — 20M+ adverse event reports
- OpenVigil France — disproportionality computation
- DailyMed — current drug labeling
- PubMed — safety literature
- Microgram decision trees — 10,733 self-tested programs

## Compliance
ICH E2B(R3) | ICH E2E | GVP Module IX | 21 CFR 314.80 | FDA MedWatch 3500
